name: compare_documents
description: Compare content between two documents or chunks, showing differences and similarities. Useful for cross-referencing information across sources.

path_a.description: File path of the first document. Provide both path_a and path_b, or both chunk_id_a and chunk_id_b.

path_b.description: File path of the second document.

chunk_id_a.description: UUID of the first chunk. Use as alternative to path_a.

chunk_id_b.description: UUID of the second chunk. Use as alternative to path_b.
